indicators.name: freestanding bathtub
indicators.rationale: A bathtub is not suitable for sleep, as it is designed for bathing and relaxation, not sleep.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is cold and not comfortable for sleep.

indicators.name: cabinets and drawers
indicators.rationale: Cabinets and drawers are not suitable for sleep, as they are not designed for resting.

indicators.name: counter space
indicators.rationale: Counter space is not suitable for sleep, as it is not designed for resting.

indicators.name: vase
indicators.rationale: A vase is not suitable for sleep, as it is not designed for resting.

indicators.name: candles
indicators.rationale: Candles are not suitable for sleep, as they can be a fire hazard and produce smoke.

reasoning_summary: The scene is not well-suited for sleep (Primary). The presence of a bathtub, hard flooring, cabinets, counter space, vase, and candles all contribute to a negative score. The lack of a bed or other suitable sleep surface makes this a marginal space for sleep.
